SEARCH
Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph

Interface StaticGraph.Builder

Enclosing interface:
StaticGraph
public static interface StaticGraph.Builder
Builder for a validated, immutable static topology.

Builder methods add logical nodes and directed edges. Calling build() validates names, types, edge compatibility, source modes, routing constraints, and preallocation/fusion eligibility before returning a graph instance.

    • stage

      <I, O> StaticGraph.Builder stage(String name, Class<I> inputType, Class<O> outputType, StageLogic<I,O> logic, StageSpec spec)
      Adds a one-message-at-a-time transformation stage.
      Parameters:
      name - stage name
      inputType - input message type
      outputType - output message type
      logic - callback invoked by the stage worker
      spec - stage execution, wait, batch, and placement options
      Returns:
      this builder

      Adds a batch transformation stage.
      Parameters:
      name - stage name
      inputType - input message type
      outputType - output message type
      logic - callback invoked with a batch of input messages
      spec - stage execution, wait, batch, and placement options
      Returns:
      this builder
